text.title: LLM-Powered Conversational AI Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying llm-powered-conversational-ai. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: LLM ships hallucinated refund policy; user demands compliance.
antipattern.root-cause: No safety filter between LLM and TTS.
antipattern.fix: Wire jailbreak + grounding filters; fail closed.

antipattern.symptom: Voice round-trip 5 s; users hang up.
antipattern.fix: Cap per-stage latency; replace TTS / model when over.

antipattern.symptom: Context overflows; model loses earlier turns; user repeats themselves.
antipattern.fix: Bound by turns + tokens; summarise oldest turns.

antipattern.symptom: Low-confidence LLM answers ship as-is; trust drops.
antipattern.fix: Route below-threshold to human or rule-based.
